policy: Keep every station where an IC/EIP/EIC/EC-IC/TLK passenger train stops; drop only clearly technical or non-passenger-looking records.
filterNotes: Low-frequency stops are kept because passengers can board/alight there.
Secondary city stations are kept because IC trains serving them make them valid passenger origins/destinations.
region-code-needed remains a data completion task before moving entries into DevelopmentSeedData.
